    3D Artifacts

What is the platform’s purpose?

Our platform aims to offer a complete digital experience for exploring Ancient Egyptian civilization by presenting artifacts and historical collections in a modern, visually engaging, and accessible way. We focus on delivering accurate and simplified information that helps audiences understand their heritage, promotes cultural awareness, and supports the preservation of Egypt’s rich history.

Documented Artifacts

Temples

Mummies

Egyptian Museums

Explore the most famous museums that house the greatest treasures from various Egyptian periods.

Grand Egyptian Museum

Giza, Egypt
Visit Official Website

The largest archaeological museum in the world, housing the most comprehensive collection of ancient Egyptian antiquities, including the complete...

National Museum of Egyptian Civilization

Cairo, Al-Fustat
Visit Official Website

A comprehensive museum tracing the arc of Egyptian civilization across successive eras, home to the celebrated Royal Mummies Hall...

Nubia Museum

Aswan, Egypt
Visit Official Website

Highlights the antiquities of Nubian civilization and its interaction with Pharaonic Egypt, with particular focus on rare pieces from...

Mummification Museum

Luxor, Egypt

Dedicated to the embalming and mummification techniques of ancient Egypt, illustrated through original tools, rare artifacts, and well-preserved mummies.

Luxor Museum

Luxor, Egypt

Presents a carefully curated selection of Pharaonic antiquities, particularly from the New Kingdom period, encompassing exceptional statuary and notable...

Egyptian Museum, Cairo

Cairo, Tahrir Square
Visit Official Website

The oldest archaeological museum in the Middle East, housing more than 120,000 Pharaonic artifacts covering every epoch of ancient...

Unique Artifacts

Discover a selection of rare and significant artifacts from Ancient Egypt, each with its own story and historical importance.

Pharaonic Masterpieces

Explore a curated collection of Pharaonic masterpieces reflecting the greatness of ancient Egyptian civilization.

Tel el-Amarna, Minya

Menkaure Triad

Menkaure Valley Temple, Giza

A set of royal statues highlighting the king-god relationship and...

Statue of Ra-Horus

Ptolemaic Period
Karnak Temple, Luxor

Statue of the god Ra-Horus in falcon form, symbolizing power...

Sacred amulet used for protection and bringing good fortune in...

Luxor Temple, Luxor

Unknown tomb, Valley of the Kings

We’re happy to hear from you for inquiries, collaborations, or sharing knowledge about Ancient Egyptian civilization.

pharaonic@antiquities.com

All information presented on this website is reliable and based on verified academic sources, with most texts and images collected from official Egyptian museums as well as international museums that house authentic ancient Egyptian artifacts, such as The Egyptian Museum, The British Museum, The Metropolitan Museum of Art, Wikimedia Commons, and Wikipedia, aiming to provide accurate and educational content about Ancient Egyptian civilization.
